intro.heading: Forged in Fire, Built for the Future
intro.text: At Contreras Steel, we don't just build structures; we build trust. With over 20 years of experience in the steel industry, we bring military-grade precision and unwavering commitment to every project. From complex commercial erections to custom fabrication, our team executes with safety, speed, and superior quality.

items.title: Structural Erection

items.title: Bar Joist & Decking
items.description: Expert installation of floor and roof systems.

testimonials.text: Contreras Steel delivered ahead of schedule with zero safety incidents. Their team is disciplined and professional.
testimonials.author: Construction Manager, Big Build Co.

testimonials.text: The quality of fabrication was outstanding. Everything fit perfectly on site.
